ResearchTabDef.label: Incremental Upg. - Buildings
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Research projects that incrementally improve existing structures and equipment.

ResearchTabDef.label: Incremental Upg. - Combat
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Research projects that incrementally improve existing weapons and armor.

ResearchTabDef.label: Incremental Upg. - Bionics
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Research projects that incrementally improve existing bionic body parts beyond standard specifications.
